title: cascadia nuttallii
intro: Cascadia nuttallii, also known as Western Yarrow, is a perennial herb native to the Pacific Northwest region of North America. The plant has been used in herbal medicine for its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties, which can be used to treat wounds, infections, and digestive issues. Cascadia nuttallii has been traditionally used to promote health and wellness, with benefits including reducing fever, relieving menstrual cramps, and soothing digestive issues. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
